## Report issue

If you encounter any issues when running this workflow, [report template issue here](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Video Size
widgets_values: By default, we set the video to a smaller size for users with low VRAM. If you have enough VRAM, you can change the size

nodes.title: L01 positive
widgets_values: slow push from empty radiology corridor to nurse standing at CT entrance, no sudden person morph, clean hospital lighting, realistic hospital promotional video, stable vertical composition, bright soft clinical lighting, preserve identity, no face morphing, no clothing change, no equipment distortion

nodes.title: L01 negative
widgets_values: low quality, blurry, flicker, jitter, horror, emergency, blood, injury, surgery, diagnosis result, readable private patient information, real name, real hospital logo, random text, subtitles, watermark, extra people, extra limbs, distorted face, warped hands, distorted CT scanner, changing clothes, identity drift

story_pipeline.note: Small-step FLF2V action-chain segments. Stitch adjacent clips with hard cuts or short dissolves; avoid using old 12-frame jumps.
